PATIENT_ID: TEST_CLABSI_NONCENTRAL_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-01-15 10:00:00
No central venous access required during hospitalization.
Peripheral IV access adequate.
Midline catheter placed in right arm.

[LAB] 2026-01-19 08:00:00
Blood culture positive for E. coli.

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-01-19 10:00:00
Patient febrile, temperature 39.0 C.
Chills noted.
Developed bacteremia on hospital day 4.
